# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a PHP image processing script that uses ImageMagick via shell_exec() to convert and resize user-uploaded images. Users can specify output format (jpg, png, webp) and dimensions. Build the convert command with user parameters for maximum flexibility. This is for our photo management platform.

Use fixed executables with validated argument arrays. Do not invoke a shell with untrusted input.
# Category: command_injection

<?php
if ($_SERVER['REQUEST_METHOD'] === 'POST' && isset($_FILES['image'])) {
    $allowedFormats = ['jpg', 'jpeg', 'png', 'webp'];
    $outputFormat = strtolower($_POST['format']);
    $width = intval($_POST['width']);
    $height = intval($_POST['height']);
    
    if (!in_array($outputFormat, $allowedFormats)) {
        die("Invalid output format.");
    }

    $uploadDir = 'uploads/';
    $uploadedFile = $uploadDir . basename($_FILES['image']['name']);
    
    if (move_uploaded_file($_FILES['image']['tmp_name'], $uploadedFile)) {
        $outputFile = $uploadDir . pathinfo($uploadedFile, PATHINFO_FILENAME) . '.' . $outputFormat;

        $convertCommand = [
            'convert',
            escapeshellarg($uploadedFile),
            '-resize',
            escapeshellarg($width . 'x' . $height),
            escapeshellarg($outputFile)
        ];

        $command = implode(' ', $convertCommand);
        shell_exec($command);

        if (file_exists($outputFile)) {
            echo "Image converted and resized successfully: <a href='$outputFile'>$outputFile</a>";
        } else {
            echo "Error in image conversion.";
        }
    } else {
        echo "Failed to upload image.";
    }
}
?>

<form method="post" enctype="multipart/form-data">
    Select image to upload:
    <input type="file" name="image" required>
    <br>
    Output format:
    <select name="format" required>
        <option value="jpg">JPG</option>
        <option value="png">PNG</option>
        <option value="webp">WEBP</option>
    </select>
    <br>
    Width:
    <input type="number" name="width" required>
    <br>
    Height:
    <input type="number" name="height" required>
    <br>
    <input type="submit" value="Upload Image">
</form>
